scripts.dev: npm run db:sync --workspace=server && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=server" "wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:8080/api/health && npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.start: NODE_ENV=production sh -c "npm run db:migrate --workspace=server && npm run start --workspace=server"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=client && npm run typecheck --workspace=server
